_comment_top: R6 Wave 7 — seed row for the AnalysisQueryHandler typed handler. Replaces the legacy hardcoded AnalysisQueryTools class (removed from SprkChatAgentFactory.ResolveTools).
_comment_routing: Runtime invocation routes to the C# class via sprk_handlerclass = 'AnalysisQueryHandler' (= nameof handler class). Auto-discovered via ToolFrameworkExtensions.AddToolHandlersFromAssembly (ADR-010).
_comment_design: Option (b): ONE row + 'method' discriminator parameter dispatches GetAnalysisResult vs GetAnalysisSummary. Rationale: the shared Seed-TypedHandlers.ps1 uses sprk_handlerclass as upsert key with SYS-% safety filter; two rows sharing handlerclass would collide on first-match query. Option (b) preserves LLM behavior (the model picks the method from a constrained enum + descriptions — equivalent information surface as picking between two tool names) AND keeps the seed script unchanged. See projects/spaarke-ai-platform-unification-r6/notes/wave-07-analysis-query-migration.md.
_comment_consumption: Read by scripts/Seed-TypedHandlers.ps1. Idempotent — script queries by sprk_handlerclass with sprk_name 'SYS-%' filter; UPSERTs.
sprk_description: Retrieves prior analysis results for a document. Provides two methods: 'GetAnalysisResult' returns the full analysis output (working document, status, token usage, timestamps); 'GetAnalysisSummary' returns an executive summary (the Executive Summary section when present, otherwise the first ~600 characters of the analysis output). Use this when the user asks about a previous analysis or wants to refer to analysis findings.
_comment_availableincontexts: 100000002 = Both (Playbook + Chat). FR-12 acceptance: invocable from both playbook orchestration and chat-driven function calling.

sprk_jsonschema.title: AnalysisQueryHandler Request
sprk_jsonschema.description: Argument shape for chat-driven invocation of AnalysisQueryHandler. 'documentId' identifies the analysis to retrieve; 'method' selects the retrieval mode.

documentId.description: Analysis identifier (GUID) to retrieve. This is the sprk_analysisoutput record id from a prior analysis.

method.description: Which retrieval mode: 'GetAnalysisResult' returns the full analysis output including status, token usage, and the working document body. 'GetAnalysisSummary' returns the executive summary section when present, otherwise a 600-character preview of the analysis output. Defaults to 'GetAnalysisResult'.

sprk_configuration._comment: Default configuration. AnalysisQueryHandler does not require any configuration parameters; the discriminator + documentId arrive via chat-tool arguments.

_comment_configuration: No handler-side configuration today. Reserved for future per-row defaults (e.g., default-method override at playbook scope).
